user.title: Tado Local
user.description: Connect to the Tado Local API.

confirm.title: Tado Local Discovered
confirm.description: A Tado Local server was found at {ip}:{port}. Do you want to set it up?

error.not_tado_local: The discovered device is not a Tado Local server

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the discovered server
abort.not_tado_local: The discovered device is not a Tado Local server

resume_all_schedules.name: Resume Schedule for All Zones
resume_all_schedules.description: Instruct Tado to resume the smart schedule for all zones.

persistent.name: Persistent (or temporary)
persistent.description: Whether to make the change persistent (=true, send to Cloud) or temporary (=false) until the next schedule change.

turn_off_all_zones.name: Turn Off Heating for All Zones
turn_off_all_zones.description: Instruct Tado to stop the smart schedule for all zones and switch to frost protection.

persistent.name: Persistent (or temporary)
persistent.description: Whether to make the change persistent (=true, send to Cloud) or temporary (=false) until the next schedule change.
